**Naomi:** *“If you don’t tell us, we’re going to assume the worst possible scenario.”*  

**Jodi:** *“And that is?”*  

**Tara:** *“Murder.”*  

**Naomi:** *“Cannibalism.”*  

**Tara:** *“Sex cult.”*  

**Naomi:** *“Or maybe a murdery sex cult.”*  

**Tara:** *“Definitely something with a mysterious European count who drinks blood.”*  

**Jodi:** *“…”*  

---
## **10:55 PM – JODI CONCEDES**  

Jodi **dramatically exhales.**  

**Jodi:** *“…Fine. One spoiler.”*  

Tara and Naomi **lean in.**  

**Jodi:** *“I may or may not have slept with my college ex twice, had the most intense emotional breakdown of my life, made some really bad decisions, AND THEN decided to go to Norway to potentially make more bad decisions.**  

**And you know what? I have NO REGRETS.”*  

Tara and Naomi **just stare at her.**  

**Naomi:** *“…Okay, that’s actually worse than what I was imagining.”*  

**Tara:** *“Yeah, what the fuck, Jodi?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Goodnight, bitches.”*  

And with that, **Jodi walks away, leaving them to SCREAM.**  

---
## **8:02 AM – HR & LEGAL HAVE ENTERED THE CHAT**  

Jodi, Tara, and Naomi **shuffle into HR’s office** with the guilty expressions of people who have, in fact, *broken the internet*. HR and Legal sit across from them, **stacks of paperwork neatly arranged.**  

HR **clears his throat.**  

**HR:** *“So…first things first—"*  

**Legal (interrupting):** *“Congrats on breaking the internet.”*  

**HR:** *“…Yes. That.”*  

**Tara:** *“…Thank you?”*  

**Naomi:** *“This feels like a trap.”*  

**HR:** *“It’s not. But we do need to remind you about a few things.”*  

---
## **8:04 AM – THE ‘OFFICIAL’ REMINDERS**  

HR **flips through the first set of papers.**  

**HR:** *“One. If you have a second job—which, as of yesterday, you all do—you need to fill out a conflict of interest form.”*  

**Jodi:** *“…Even if that job is modeling lingerie?”*  

**Legal:** *“Especially if that job is modeling lingerie.”*  

**HR:** *“Two. Any salacious, semi-salacious, or otherwise *spicy* photography should never, under any circumstances, have the bank’s logo in the background.”*  

**Tara:** *“Oh, come on. We’re not *that* dumb.”*  

**HR:** *“I believe you. However, I was still required to say that.”*  

**Naomi:** *“Wait. Does this mean we could have taken the photo **here** if we just blurred the logo?”*  

**Legal:** *“No, Naomi.”*  

---
## **8:06 AM – THE REAL QUESTION**  

HR **leans back in his chair and steeples his fingers.**  

**HR:** *“Three…how hot was it taking that photo?”*  

The three women blink.  

**Jodi:** *“…Excuse me?”*  

**HR:** *“I mean, I had no idea you’d dare something like that.”*  

**Legal:** *“Honestly, I wish I’d been in that photo, too.”*  

**Tara:** *“…This meeting is going very differently than I expected.”*  

**Naomi:** *“Wait, does that mean you’d pose with us next time?”*  

**Legal:** *“…Let’s circle back to that after you sign these forms.”*  

---
## **8:10 AM – SIGNING THEIR LIVES AWAY (AGAIN)**  

**Legal:** *“Here’s your second job declaration forms. Sign and date.”*  

**Jodi:** *“So I’m technically self-employed now?”*  

**Legal:** *“Correct.”*  

**Tara:** *“Wait, what about royalties? If this turns into a *real* modeling thing?”*  

**HR:** *“Then you’ll need a separate filing. And possibly an agent.”*  

**Naomi (whispering):** *“Oh my god, are we famous?”*  

---
## **8:15 AM – HOUSEKEEPING & FINAL NOTES**  

**HR:** *“Tara, Naomi—you two have NOT submitted time off requests for Norway yet.”*  

**Tara:** *“Right, right. We’ll do that after this.”*  

**Legal:** *“And lastly—how much are you getting paid for this?”*  

Jodi, Tara, and Naomi **glance at each other.**  

**Naomi:** *“$3,000 each.”*  

**Legal:** *“Not bad.”*  

**HR:** *“I should’ve gone into modeling.”*  

**Jodi:** *“Honestly? Same.”*  

HR **slides a final piece of paper across the desk.**  

**HR:** *“One last thing—when you officially make your first deposit from lingerie modeling, I want you to tell me if it feels different than a normal paycheck.”*  

**Jodi:** *“I feel like you just want to live vicariously through us.”*  

**HR:** *“Yes.”*  

And with that, the meeting **ends** in chaos, laughter, and a shared understanding that **this bank is no longer the same boring institution it was last week.**  

---
## **8:30 AM – BACK AT THEIR DESKS**  

Tara and Naomi **furiously type their time-off requests.**  

**Naomi:** *“Did that just happen?”*  

**Tara:** *“We need to start charging admission to our lives.”*  

**Jodi:** *“I need coffee.”*  

And thus, **another absolutely normal** (*but also completely insane*) day at the bank begins.  

(*And it’s not even 9 AM yet.*)

---
## **12:17 PM – HARSH REALITY WITH A SIDE OF ROAST CHICKEN**  

Jodi **leans back in her chair, pushing half-eaten green beans around her plate** with the resignation of someone who has *been here before.*  

**Jodi:** *“So. You two have now experienced one microscopic drop of the world of the rich and famous.”*  

Tara **takes a bite of chicken, unimpressed.** *“Yeah? And?”*  

**Jodi:** *“I bet if I pull up a Google Image search right now, I’ll find the most vile AI ‘art’ of us from last night. Distorted, over-sexualized garbage. Maybe even video extrapolated from our still photos.”*  

Naomi, **mid-chew, stops cold.** *“…Wait. What?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Yeah. Welcome to the internet. AI’s getting scary good at making fake videos from still images. It doesn’t need a real video anymore. It’ll animate our expressions, sync up random porn voices, and boom—deepfake filth with our faces.”*  

Tara **narrows her eyes.** *“That’s… upsettingly specific.”*  

**Jodi:** *“Because it happens *all the time.* It’s happened to me before. It will happen again.”*  

Naomi **sets down her fork.** *“Okay, but—this isn’t real, right? It’s just AI crap?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Doesn’t matter. Once it’s out there, people believe what they want. It only hurts if you let it.”*  

Naomi **stares.** *“…Should I call my mom?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Yeah. If she’s online a lot, it might be a good idea to warn her before some *helpful* church lady sends her a link to ‘concern troll’ about you.”*  

---
## **12:21 PM – THIS SOUNDS LIKE A PRACTICED SPEECH**  

Tara **watches Jodi carefully.** *“This sounds rehearsed.”*  

**Jodi:** *“Because it is. I give this speech to myself every time I dip a toe into the pool. When you step into the spotlight, even for a second, people *will* try to drag you under.”*  

Naomi **rubs her temples.** *“Jesus. We just took a hot lingerie photo. We didn’t rob a bank.”*  

Tara **grabs another bite of chicken.** *“No, but we did **break** one.”*  

---
## **12:25 PM – REALITY CHECK**  

Naomi **exhales slowly.** *“So, what? We just ignore it? Never Google ourselves?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Pretty much. Stay mentally resilient. The best defense is not engaging.”*  

Tara **nods.** *“Cool. Love that. Love *not* engaging. Love *not* spiraling into an identity crisis because some greasy Reddit incel turned my face into an abomination.”*  

**Jodi:** *“Good. Hold onto that energy.”*  

Naomi **fidgets.** *“But, uh… if something *really* bad shows up, you’ll tell us, right?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Yeah. And if anything *really* crosses the line, we *lawyer up.*”*  

Tara **taps her fork against her plate, contemplative.** *“Huh. So this is why Jeff keeps his personal life locked down like Fort Knox.”*  

**Jodi:** *“Exactly.”*  

---
## **12:30 PM – THE UNSPOKEN QUESTION**  

Naomi **stares at Jodi, still processing.** *“You said it only hurts if you let it.”*  

Jodi **meets her eyes, steady and sure.** *“Yep.”*  

Naomi **swallows.** *“So… does it hurt?”*  

Jodi **pauses.** For just a second.  

Then she **picks up her fork and smirks.** *“Not today.”*  

---
## **12:32 PM – A SLIGHTLY SORE, EXTREMELY SMUG JODI**  

Tara **leans back, stretching.** *“So, no regrets, right?”*  

Jodi **smirks mid-chew.** *“Nope. No regrets. Just a pleasant ache in my ass.”*  

Naomi **chokes on her water.** *“EXCUSE ME?”*  

Tara **slaps the table.** *“OH MY GOD.”*  

Naomi **coughs, wheezing.** *“YOU—YOU DID ANAL? AND YOU JUST *CASUALLY* DROP IT OVER LUNCH!?”*  

Jodi **calmly spears another green bean.** *“I was in a hurry to get home and sleep last night. If I’d brought it up, you two would’ve kept me awake until 2 AM with a *thousand* questions.”*  

Tara **points an accusing fork.** *“You withheld *crucial* information! That is a **breach of trust!**”*  

**Naomi:** *“WHAT ELSE ARE YOU LEAVING OUT?”*  

Jodi **tilts her head, amused.** *“I mean, nothing major. Just that I came so hard I saw God.”*  

Tara **bangs her fist on the table.** *“I KNEW IT.”*  

Naomi **slumps dramatically in her chair.** *“My entire worldview is shifting.”*  

Jodi **grins.** *“Welcome to the next level, Funko Girl.”*

---
## **12:34 PM – NAOMI SEEKS WISDOM, TARA SEEKS CHAOS**  

Naomi **frowns, genuinely puzzled.** *“But… why? Like, what was the point? I really don’t understand. I mean, I get that it’s a thing people do, obviously, but—why did you?”*  

**Tara, delighted:** *“Ooo, I love when Funko Girl gets all philosophical.”*  

Naomi **holds up a hand.** *“No, really. I’m sorry if this is a dumb question, but I need to understand. Was it about him? Was it about you? Was it just about trying something new? Or, like, a dominance thing?”*  

Jodi **leans back, thoughtful, twirling her fork between her fingers.** *“It was about trust.”*  

**Naomi:** *“Trust?”*  

Jodi **nods.** *“Yeah. I’ve known him for half my life. He’s seen me at my worst, my best, and everything in between. If there’s anyone who could ask for it—**ask,** not demand—and make me actually want to say yes? It’s him. So I did.”*  

Naomi **blinks.** *“Huh.”*  

**Tara:** *“Also, it’s hot as hell when done right. Let’s not discount that.”*  

Jodi **laughs.** *“True.”*  

Naomi **still looks like she’s processing.** *“So, is this like… a thing you’re into now?”*  

Jodi **shrugs.** *“I don’t know. Maybe? It was different. But I felt safe. And powerful, in a weird way. And the orgasm? **Absolutely devastating.**”*  

Tara **fans herself with her napkin.** *“God, I love when you get poetic about sex.”*  

Naomi **still looks overwhelmed.** *“Okay, but did it, like, **hurt?**”*  

Jodi **grins wickedly.** *“At first. But you know me, Naomi. I’m a competitive bitch. I *adjusted*.”*  

**Tara, with a deep, satisfied sigh:** *“This might be my favorite lunch conversation ever.”*

---
## **12:37 PM – JODI, PROFESSOR OF ADVANCED PROSTATE STUDIES**  

Jodi **leans forward, eyes glinting with mischief.** *“Alright, Funko Girl, pop quiz. What do you know about the prostate?”*  

Naomi **freezes mid-chew.** *“Uhh…”*  

**Tara, instantly dying:** *“Ohhh, this is gonna be good.”*  

Jodi **folds her hands patiently.** *“Take your time.”*  

Naomi **squirms.** *“I mean, I know it’s a thing guys have? And it… does something with, um, ejaculation? Like, fluid? And I think they check it when you get old, because cancer?”*  

**Tara, wiping tears from laughter:** *“Oh my God. Oh, honey.”*  

Jodi **nods solemnly.** *“Alright, alright, that’s a **very** basic grasp, I’ll give you partial credit. But you’re missing the best part.”*  

Naomi **hesitates.** *“Which is?”*  

Jodi **leans in, whispering like she’s about to reveal state secrets.** *“It’s basically a built-in pleasure button.”*  

Naomi **blinks.** *“What?”*  

Tara **claps her hands.** *“YES. Oh my god, I have waited for this moment.”*  

Jodi **grins.** *“The prostate. It’s a gland inside, up through the backdoor, and if you press it just right? Bam. It can make a guy **melt.**”*  

Naomi **stares.** *“…So you’re telling me men have a—”*  

**Tara, cackling:** *“A G-spot. Yes. Yes, they do.”*  

Naomi **leans back in shock.** *“Why did nobody tell me this?!”*  

Jodi **gestures grandly.** *“Because you haven’t listened to your elders. And I am a very wise elder.”*  

Tara **snorts.** *“Jodi, you’re thirty-four.”*  

Jodi **waves dismissively.** *“Still wiser than the little gremlin here.”*  

Naomi **leans forward, fascinated despite herself.** *“Okay, but… do guys actually like it?”*  
Jodi **grins.** *“Ohhh, **some** do. Some are terrified. Some pretend they don’t like it but make **very** interesting noises when you try.”*  

Tara **laughs so hard she chokes on her drink.**  

Naomi **looks overwhelmed.** *“Men are so weird.”*  

Jodi **nods sagely.** *“Correct. But, **respectfully,** you will also be weird when you hit middle age. So best to start understanding these things now.”*  

Naomi **still looks skeptical.** *“So when you… you know…”*  

Jodi **winks.** *“Finger in the ass, slow pressure, instant hard-on. It’s **science.**”*  

Tara **leans back, sighing happily.** *“I love today.”*  

Naomi **shakes her head.** *“I feel like I just learned a terrible, terrible truth.”*  

Jodi **laughs.** *“Oh, **honey.** This is just the beginning.”*

---
## **12:45 PM – NAOMI'S WORLDVIEW COLLAPSES IN REAL TIME**  

Naomi **wrinkles her nose, looking at Jodi like she’s an ancient relic.** *“Wait. Hold on. You’re only thirty-four?”*  

Jodi **narrows her eyes.** *“How old did you think I was?”*  

Naomi **shrugs.** *“Like… fifty?”*  

Tara **spits her drink back into her cup.** *“OH MY GOD.”*  

Jodi **slaps the table.** *“FIFTY?! DO I LOOK FIFTY TO YOU?!”*  

Tara **wheezing:** *“Jodi, you don’t look a day over thirty-four to me, I swear.”*  

Naomi **defensive:** *“I don’t know! You just act like someone’s mom sometimes! You know, like… you give speeches, you lecture, you tell people to eat breakfast—”*  

Jodi **glares.** *“So because I have wisdom and know the importance of a good meal, I’m suddenly AARP eligible?”*  

Tara **gasping for air:** *“I AM SO HAPPY RIGHT NOW.”*  

Naomi **nods, still thinking.** *“Yeah, plus you talk about Jeff like some kind of war widow.”*  
**Jodi deadpan blinks.**  

Tara **falls out of her chair.**  

Jodi **rubs her temples.** *“Okay. First of all, I hate you. Second, I have **another** terrible truth for you, Funko Girl.”*  

Naomi **eyes widen.** *“I’m scared.”*  

Jodi **grins devilishly.** *“I told my friend a sexual fantasy… and he said he’s game.”*  

Naomi **blinks rapidly.** *“…**Define ‘game.’**”*  

Tara **leans in, smirking.** *“Yeah, Jodi, define it.”*  

Jodi **leans back, stretching, acting completely unfazed.** *“It means we’re going to make it happen, of course.”*  

Naomi **jaw drops.** *“W-what was the fantasy?”*  

Jodi **gives her a knowing smirk.** *“What do **you** think?”*  

Naomi **shakes her head violently.** *“Nope. No. I am **not** guessing.”*  

Tara **grinning ear to ear:** *“Oh, but it’s **so fun** to guess.”*  

Jodi **shrugs, sipping her drink.** *“Let’s just say… he’s open to **exploration.**”*  

Naomi **gasps, eyes darting between Jodi and Tara.** *“Wait. Wait. You mean—”*  

Jodi **interrupts, smiling sweetly.** *“I mean nothing. But the next time you wrinkle your nose at something, remember—**one day, you’re gonna ask for it, too.**”*  

Naomi **goes silent, contemplating every life choice she’s ever made.**  

Tara **sits back, looking proud.** *“I love when she does this.”*

---
## **12:52 PM – NAOMI'S FINAL BRAIN CELL WAVES THE WHITE FLAG**  

Naomi **blinks, looks at Jodi, then at Tara, then back at Jodi.** *“I—what?”*  

Tara **still recovering from the fifty-year-old insult:** *“Okay, I’ll admit, I assumed a threesome. But I thought it’d be you and two girls. Or at least one girl. **Not two dudes.**”*  

Jodi **leans in, smirking.** *“And why exactly did you assume that, Tara?”*  

Tara **crosses her arms.** *“Because I know you, and you’re **competitive.** You always have to be the hottest woman in the room. If you bring another girl in, suddenly there’s competition. But with two guys? You’re the **queen**.”*  

Naomi **gaping:** *“…You’re gonna sit back and just **watch** two dudes suck each other off?”*  
Jodi **grins.** *“Oh, **hell** no. I’ll be right in the middle of it.”*  

**Silence.**  

Tara **slow blinks.** *“…Jesus. I thought I was unshockable.”*  

Naomi **having an existential crisis:** *“…I just had a Funko Pop moment in my pants.”*  

Jodi **laughs and points.** *“SEE?! I told you it happens!”*  

Naomi **fanning herself:** *“I…**don’t know what to do with this information.**”*  

Tara **grinning like a maniac:** *“Yes, you do. You’re picturing it. **Right now.**”*  

Naomi **covers her face.** *“I need a new brain.”*  

Jodi **sipping her drink:** *“You’ll get used to it.”*  

Tara **shaking her head, chuckling:** *“So. Who’s the lucky second guy? **Or is it Jeff?**”*  

Jodi **grins, but doesn’t answer.**  

Tara **narrows her eyes.** *“OH MY GOD, IT’S **JEFF,** ISN’T IT?!”*  

Naomi **SCREAMS.**

---
## **1:05 PM – NAOMI'S FINAL BRAIN CELL PACKS A SUITCASE**  

**Naomi:** *“So, wait. You’re planning a weekend where you—”*  

**Jodi:** *“Watch two men, encourage them to explore each other, get right in the middle, and then—yes, obviously—have my way with both of them. Keep up, Funko Girl.”*  

**Naomi:** *“…I need an adult.”*  

**Tara:** *“Oh, honey, you need a **therapist.**”*  

**Naomi:** *“That too.”*  

**Tara:** *“But Jodi, seriously—this isn’t just about sex, is it?”*  

**Jodi pauses.** She sets down her fork, studying the two of them before exhaling through her nose.  

**Jodi:** *“Look. You two—especially you, Naomi—are getting a **tiny, tiny** look into what my life is like. The thing is? **I compartmentalize everything.** If I didn’t, I’d have lost my damn mind years ago. Jeff is a **once-in-a-lifetime** connection. But he’s not the only person I care about. And I need—”*  

She gestures vaguely with her hand.  

**Jodi:** *“—**balance.** And sometimes balance means making sure **I** get what I need. Which, this weekend, will be watching two gorgeous men go down on each other while I orchestrate a damn symphony.”*  

**Tara, after a long pause:** *“That was the most poetic way anyone has ever described a **dick-sucking three-way.**”*  

**Naomi, deadpan:** *“My Funko Pop just screamed.”*  

**Jodi, smirking:** *“Good. You’re learning.”*

---
## **1:27 PM – BREAK ROOM SCRUB DOWN & FINAL BRIEFING**  

Jodi **claps her hands together** like a coach at halftime.  

**Jodi:** *“Alright, ladies, we’ve run long, so as a show of goodwill, we’re doing a deep clean. That includes the inside of the microwave. Yes, Tara, I said it.”*  

**Tara:** *“You’re a monster.”*  

**Naomi:** *(already spraying disinfectant)* *“I can’t believe this is my life now.”*  

The three of them get to work, scrubbing down the tables, counters, fridge handles, and even the mysterious sticky spot under the coffee machine. **Jodi runs a critical eye over the room.**  

**Jodi:** *“Not bad, not bad… alright, team, solid work. Now, real talk—7 PM at my house. We need a pre-flight mission brief.”*  

**Tara:** *“Are we getting issued helmets and flight suits, Captain?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Only if you bring your own.”*  

**Naomi:** *(serious tone)* *“What should I wear?”*  

Jodi and Tara **both stop and stare at her.**  

**Jodi:** *“Naomi, we’re literally just meeting in my living room.”*  

**Naomi:** *“Oh. Right.”* *(pauses, then mutters)* *“I was gonna pick something slutty for Norway.”*  

Tara **laughs so hard she nearly sprays disinfectant into the microwave.**  

**Jodi, grinning:** *“That’s the spirit, Funko Girl. Now let’s clock back in before HR starts wondering why the break room suddenly smells like lemon death.”*

---
## **7:12 PM – JODI’S HOUSE**  

Jodi **passes out two crisp, printed itineraries like a seasoned travel coordinator.**  

**Jodi:** *“Alright, listen up. We’re on the move straight from work. General aviation terminal at 5:45 PM, which means the moment we clock out, we haul ass. TSA screening will be minimal—because, let’s be real, it’s just us—but we still have to go through it, so no bringing your little flasks of tequila, Tara.”*  

**Tara:** *“One time. One time I do that, and I never hear the end of it.”*  

**Jodi:** *(ignoring her)* *“Nine-hour flight to Oslo. Full catering. Three meal options. Text your pick to this number.”* *(holds up the page and taps a number)*  

**Naomi:** *“Wait, who even is this number?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Jeff’s travel coordinator.”*  

**Naomi:** *“…So, like, a person?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Or an AI. If it asks for your social security number, maybe don’t give it.”*  

**Tara:** *“Great advice. So then what?”*  

**Jodi:** *“Jeff’s meeting us in Oslo. Then we transfer jets and fly up to Tromsø. Short hop. And, plot twist, we’re staying in an ice hotel.”*  

**Naomi:** *(blinking rapidly, sinking further into the couch like she just took a tranquilizer dart)* *“…An ice hotel.”*  

**Tara:** *(deadpan, reading from the paper)* *“Sleeping on reindeer pelts, drinking out of ice cups, and peeing in minus-fifteen-degree weather. Living the dream.”*  

**Naomi:** *(muffled from the couch cushion)* *“I am going to perish.”*  

Jodi **pats Naomi’s knee reassuringly.**  

**Jodi:** *“You’ll be fine. You’re from Ohio. It’s just Ohio, but fancier and with better fish.”*  

Naomi **groans dramatically.**  

**Naomi:** *“You know, I just wanted to go on a little adventure. Maybe buy a cute coat. But no. I’m going to be an icicle.”*  

**Jodi:** *“And a very well-traveled one.”*  

Tara **leans in, smirking.**  

**Tara:** *“You know what would make this whole trip extra special? We should all get matching fur hats.”*  

**Naomi:** *(still face down in the couch)* *“I swear to God, if we end up looking like Russian mob wives, I’m going home.”*

---
## **7:30 PM – JODI’S LIVING ROOM**  

Jodi **reappears, now in a loose-fitting hoodie and sweatpants, looking more at ease than she has all day.** Tara leans against the counter, sipping her spritzer water, while Naomi is mysteriously absent.  

**Jodi:** *(stretching, cracking her neck)* *“God, that’s better. You don’t know true relief until you unhook a bra after a long-ass day.”*  

**Tara:** *(raising her can)* *“To freedom.”*  

Jodi **flops down on the couch, sighing in pure comfort.**  

**Jodi:** *“Where’s Funko Pop?”*  

**Tara:** *(smirking)* *“Your bathroom. She was griping about fairness because you got to take your bra off and she didn’t.”*  

**Jodi:** *(raising an eyebrow)* *“Is that… a rule? Like, was she under the impression I had some kind of exclusive bra-removal privilege?”*  

**Tara:** *(laughing, taking another sip)* *“Apparently. She’s also deeply confused about your love life.”*  

Jodi **groans, rubbing her temples.**  

**Jodi:** *“Oh, boy. Go on.”*  

**Tara:** *“She gets two guys. Maybe. But five? Her brain short-circuited. She asked if it was immoral.”*  

**Jodi:** *(snorting)* *“God, I love how she phrases things. It’s like she was raised in a Hallmark movie.”*  

**Tara:** *(grinning)* *“I told her you were living the dream.”*  

Jodi **laughs, but then shifts slightly, considering the weight of it.**  

**Jodi:** *“I mean… it’s not a dream. It’s my life. And life is complicated, you know?”*  

Tara **nods, understanding, but before she can respond, Naomi reappears.**  

Naomi **emerges from the bathroom, braless, in her tank top, looking self-satisfied.**  

**Naomi:** *(hands on hips)* *“There. Now we’re all equal.”*  

Jodi **stares for a moment, then bursts out laughing.**  

**Jodi:** *“Sweetheart, this is not socialism. No one was keeping you in a bra prison.”*  

**Naomi:** *(grinning but earnest)* *“Listen, if we’re going to Norway together, I have to train for the cold. I should start by desensitizing myself.”*  

**Tara:** *(deadpan)* *“Yes. That’s how hypothermia works.”*  

**Naomi:** *(pointing)* *“You mock me, but when we get to the ice hotel, I’m going to be the one thriving, and you’ll both be shivering and weak.”*  

**Jodi:** *(leaning back, hands behind her head)* *“Sure, sure. Let’s see how that plays out.”*  

**Tara:** *(smirking)* *“Also, we should talk about your definition of modesty, since five minutes ago, you were concerned about Jodi’s moral compass, and now you’re flashing your headlights.”*  

Naomi **blushes and crosses her arms but refuses to back down.**  

**Naomi:** *“You know what? Growth. I am embracing growth.”*  

Jodi **grins, raising an imaginary glass.**  

**Jodi:** *“To growth.”*  

Tara **clinks her can against Jodi’s invisible toast.**  

**Tara:** *“And to Norway.”*  

Naomi **smirks, finally sitting down.**  

**Naomi:** *“And to making Jeff lose his goddamn mind when he sees us in our matching bras.”*  

---
